queries.question: Give me all the songs and their composers.
queries.sql: SELECT song.title, Musician.name FROM  Musician JOIN Soundtrack on Soundtrack.Musician_id=Musician.id JOIN Song ON Song.soundtrack_id = Soundtrack.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name WHERE {
  ?musician a :Musician .
  ?soundtrack a :Soundtrack .
  ?soundtrack p:hasMusician ?musician .
  ?song a :Song .
  ?song p:hasSoundtrack ?soundtrack .
  ?song p:title ?title .
  ?musician p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: Give me all the songs and their composers.
queries.sql: SELECT song.title, Band.name FROM  Band JOIN Soundtrack on Soundtrack.Band_id=Band.id JOIN Song ON Song.soundtrack_id = Soundtrack.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name WHERE {
  ?band a :Band .
  ?soundtrack a :Soundtrack .
  ?soundtrack p:hasBand ?band .
  ?song a :Song .
  ?song p:hasSoundtrack ?soundtrack .
  ?song p:title ?title .
  ?band p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: Give me all the songs and their composers.
queries.sql: SELECT song.title, Band.name, Musician.name FROM  Musician JOIN Soundtrack on Soundtrack.id=Musician.id JOIN Song ON Song.soundtrack_id = Soundtrack.id JOIN Band on Soundtrack.Band_id=Band.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?musician a :Musician .
  ?soundtrack a :Soundtrack .
  ?soundtrack p:id ?id_l .
  ?musician p:id ?id_r .
  ?song a :Song .
  ?song p:hasSoundtrack ?soundtrack .
  ?band a :Band .
  ?soundtrack p:hasBand ?band .
  ?song p:title ?title .
  ?band p:name ?name .
  ?musician p:name ?name2 .
  FILTER(STR(?id_l) = STR(?id_r))
}

queries.question: Which musician composed the songs played at the music festival?
queries.sql: SELECT Band.name  FROM Soundtrack JOIN Band on Soundtrack.Band_id=Band.id WHERE Soundtrack.title= 'Music Festival'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?soundtrack a :Soundtrack .
  ?band a :Band .
  ?soundtrack p:hasBand ?band .
  ?band p:name ?name .
  ?soundtrack p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = STR("Music Festival"))
}

queries.question: Show the band and musicians responsible for composing the music festival's program.
queries.sql: SELECT Band.name, Musician.name  FROM Soundtrack JOIN Musician on Soundtrack.id=Musician.id JOIN Band on Soundtrack.Band_id=Band.id  WHERE Soundtrack.title= 'Music Festival'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?soundtrack a :Soundtrack .
  ?musician a :Musician .
  ?soundtrack p:id ?id_l .
  ?musician p:id ?id_r .
  ?band a :Band .
  ?soundtrack p:hasBand ?band .
  ?band p:name ?name .
  ?musician p:name ?name2 .
  ?soundtrack p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?id_l) = STR(?id_r))
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = STR("Music Festival"))
}

queries.question: Who wrote the music for the music festival?
queries.sql: SELECT Musician.name  FROM Soundtrack JOIN Musician on Soundtrack.Musician_id=Musician.id WHERE Soundtrack.title= 'Music Festival'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?soundtrack a :Soundtrack .
  ?musician a :Musician .
  ?soundtrack p:hasMusician ?musician .
  ?musician p:name ?name .
  ?soundtrack p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = STR("Music Festival"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Who wrote the music for the music festival?
Give me all the songs and their composers.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?title ?name WHERE {
  ?band a :Band .
  ?soundtrack a :Soundtrack .
  ?soundtrack p:hasBand ?band .
  ?song a :Song .
  ?song p:hasSoundtrack ?soundtrack .
  ?song p:title ?title .
  ?band p:name ?name .
} }
  full: { SELECT ?title ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?musician a :Musician .
  ?soundtrack a :Soundtrack .
  ?soundtrack p:id ?id_l .
  ?musician p:id ?id_r .
  ?song a :Song .
  ?song p:hasSoundtrack ?soundtrack .
  ?band a :Band .
  ?soundtrack p:hasBand ?band .
  ?song p:title ?title .
  ?band p:name ?name .
  ?musician p:name ?name2 .
  FILTER(STR(?id_l) = STR(?id_r))
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?title ?name WHERE {
  ?musician a :Musician .
  ?soundtrack a :Soundtrack .
  ?soundtrack p:hasMusician ?musician .
  ?song a :Song .
  ?song p:hasSoundtrack ?soundtrack .
  ?song p:title ?title .
  ?musician p:name ?name .
} }
}
